use_cases: Highlighting key product features on landing pages with animated emphasis
Showcasing product capabilities with interactive hover effects on feature sections
Presenting new product announcements with refined typography transitions
Creating engaging hero sections that reveal content through smooth animations
ai_summary: A feature spotlight component designed for showcasing product highlights with smooth hover-triggered animations. Features elegant typography with letter-spacing transitions and animated decorative lines. Built with responsive design for seamless desktop and mobile experiences, making it ideal for SaaS landing pages and product feature sections.
